rules.title: MCP stdio process server detected
rules.why_it_matters: A stdio MCP server starts a local process. The agent may delegate tool calls to that process.
recommended_actions: Verify the MCP package source and command arguments.
recommended_alternatives: Use a local verified MCP server with a pinned version.
Disable this MCP server if it is not required.
rules.migration_instruction: Replace moving MCP commands such as npx latest with a pinned package version.

rules.title: Remote MCP endpoint detected
rules.why_it_matters: Remote MCP endpoints can receive tool calls or provide tools from outside the local environment.
recommended_actions: Verify the remote MCP owner and transport security.
Restrict exposed tools if the client supports filtering.
recommended_alternatives: Prefer a local stdio MCP server from a verified source for sensitive tasks.
rules.migration_instruction: Disable remote MCP endpoints for sensitive workspaces or replace them with local pinned MCP servers.

rules.title: Filesystem write MCP capability detected
rules.why_it_matters: Filesystem write tools can modify local files through agent tool calls.
recommended_actions: Limit filesystem tools to a dedicated workspace.
recommended_alternatives: Use read-only filesystem tooling for inspection tasks.
rules.migration_instruction: Replace write-capable filesystem tools with read-only tools when the task only needs inspection.
